description: API7.ai builds API gateway and AI gateway products based on Apache APISIX, including self-hosted enterprise gateway software, a SaaS/cloud control plane, and tooling for managing API and LLM traffic. Its products are used to route, secure, observe, and manage APIs and AI-provider requests.
summary: api7.ai exposes documented self-hosted/admin HTTP APIs for API7 Gateway and AISIX AI Gateway, an AISIX proxy HTTP API plus MCP endpoint for AI traffic, and the ADC CLI for declarative management.
